content: img src    Friday is your weekly selection of awesome robotics videos, collected by your friends at   span  em IEEE Spectrum  em  span  robotics. We also post a weekly calendar of upcoming robotics events for the next few months. Please   span  a   us your events  a  span  for inclusion.  span   p  h5  a href    2026  a   1 5 June 2026, VIENNA  h5  p Enjoy today s videos!  p  div class  horizontal-rule    div  div style  page-break-after  always   span style  display none     span   div  p class  rm-anchors  id  vbld_nq0_7a  Happy Holidays from Boston Dynamics!  p  p class  shortcode-media shortcode-media-youtube   span class  rm-shortcode  data-rm-shortcode-id  56804a5e21ac8ebec0d95196a418b51c  style  display block position relative padding-top 56.25     iframe frameborder  0  height  auto  lazy-loadable  true  scrolling  no  src    style  position absolute top 0 left 0 width 100  height 100    width  100     iframe   span   p  p I would pay any amount of money for that lamp.  p  p    a href    Dynamics  a     p  div class  horizontal-rule    div  blockquote class  rm-anchors  id  ele87bs41ui   em What if evolution wasn t carbon-based but metal instead? This short film explores an alternative, iron-based evolution through robots, simulation, and real-world machines. Inspired by biological evolution, this Christmas lab film imagines a world where machines evolve instead of organisms.  em   blockquote  p class  shortcode-media shortcode-media-youtube   span class  rm-shortcode  data-rm-shortcode-id  d08b79aeb3dcf76a5758fd47e51e123c  style  display block position relative padding-top 56.25     iframe frameborder  0  height  auto  lazy-loadable  true  scrolling  no  src    style  position absolute top 0 left 0 width 100  height 100    width  100     iframe   span   p  p    a href    Zurich Robotics System Lab  a     p  div class  horizontal-rule    div  p class  rm-anchors  id  ejmrbdj26xw   a data-linked-post     href    target  _blank  Happy Holidays  a  from FieldAI!  p  p class  shortcode-media shortcode-media-youtube   span class  rm-shortcode  data-rm-shortcode-id  6ce6c48a3a2625345eaed7e8d0978a9d  style  display block position relative padding-top 56.25     iframe frameborder  0  height  auto  lazy-loadable  true  scrolling  no  src    style  position absolute top 0 left 0 width 100  height 100    width  100     iframe   span   p  p    a href       p  p Thanks, Bram!  p  div class  horizontal-rule    div  p class  shortcode-media shortcode-media-youtube   span class  rm-shortcode  data-rm-shortcode-id  385a49a0d8e1480f03dd0c62bdb9307e  style  display block position relative padding-top 56.25     iframe frameborder  0  height  auto  lazy-loadable  true  scrolling  no  src    style  position absolute top 0 left 0 width 100  height 100    width  100     iframe   span   p  p    a href       p  div class  horizontal-rule    div  blockquote class  rm-anchors  id  yajexvpvftm   em Check out how SCUTTLE tackles the dull, dirty, and dangerous tasks of the pest control industry.  em   blockquote  p class  shortcode-media shortcode-media-youtube   span class  rm-shortcode  data-rm-shortcode-id  85b5c09ce282ead5e1fed8d7d7b7401c  style  display block position relative padding-top 56.25     iframe frameborder  0  height  auto  lazy-loadable  true  scrolling  no  src    style  position absolute top 0 left 0 width 100  height 100    width  100     iframe   span   p  p    a href    Control Robotics  a     p  div class  horizontal-rule    div  p class  rm-anchors  id  7un7on_4a50  Happy Holidays from LimX Dynamics!  p  p class  shortcode-media shortcode-media-youtube   span class  rm-shortcode  data-rm-shortcode-id  0a40df7f37d33d266314691b9a3df018  style  display block position relative padding-top 56.25     iframe frameborder  0  height  auto  lazy-loadable  true  scrolling  no  src    style  position absolute top 0 left 0 width 100  height 100    width  100     iframe   span   p  p    a href    Dynamics  a     p  div class  horizontal-rule    div  p class  rm-anchors  id  rptducyg4uc  Happy  actually maybe not AI?  Holidays from Kawasaki Robotics!  p  p class  shortcode-media shortcode-media-youtube   span class  rm-shortcode  data-rm-shortcode-id  b370b393a3d297f0b076568a6545dd16  style  display block position relative padding-top 56.25     iframe frameborder  0  height  auto  lazy-loadable  true  scrolling  no  src    style  position absolute top 0 left 0 width 100  height 100    width  100     iframe   span   p  p    a href    Robotics  a     p  div class  horizontal-rule    div  p class  rm-anchors  id  mcwh-8p2ifk  Happy Holidays from AgileX Robotics  p  p class  shortcode-media shortcode-media-youtube   span class  rm-shortcode  data-rm-shortcode-id  1d0e54e0b57e2c a2bfd97  style  display block position relative padding-top 56.25     iframe frameborder  0  height  auto  lazy-loadable  true  scrolling  no  src    style  position absolute top 0 left 0 width 100  height 100    width  100     iframe   span   p  p    a href    Robotics  a     p  div class  horizontal-rule    div  blockquote class  rm-anchors  id  nmahcm-gvng   em Big news   a data-linked-post     href    target  _blank  Badminton  a  just got a new training partner. Our humanoid robot can rally with a human in continuous exchanges, combining fast returns with stable movement. Peak return speed reaches 19.1 m s.  em   blockquote  p class  shortcode-media shortcode-media-youtube   span class  rm-shortcode  data-rm-shortcode-id  5d9842fd50c4fe4c31058dac43a7884f  style  display block position relative padding-top 56.25     iframe frameborder  0  height  auto  lazy-loadable  true  scrolling  no  src    style  position absolute top 0 left 0 width 100  height 100    width  100     iframe   span   p  p    a href       p  div class  horizontal-rule    div  p class  rm-anchors  id  djputzarfxk  Well, here s one way of deploying a legged robot.  p  p class  shortcode-media shortcode-media-youtube   span class  rm-shortcode  data-rm-shortcode-id  865042bd739fb496831806d8c43586c8  style  display block position relative padding-top 56.25     iframe frameborder  0  height  auto  lazy-loadable  true  scrolling  no  src    style  position absolute top 0 left 0 width 100  height 100    width  100     iframe   span   p  p    a href       p  div class  horizontal-rule    div  blockquote class  rm-anchors  id  r86ooq3kob4   em Today, we present the world s first demo video of a full-size robot taking on the challenging Charleston dance.  em   blockquote  p class  shortcode-media shortcode-media-youtube   span class  rm-shortcode  data-rm-shortcode-id  effdd7f8162ef8f43d4dffb7b2f60649  style  display block position relative padding-top 56.25     iframe frameborder  0  height  auto  lazy-loadable  true  scrolling  no  src    style  position absolute top 0 left 0 width 100  height 100    width  100     iframe   span   p  p    a href       p  div class  horizontal-rule    div  blockquote class  rm-anchors  id  7wxnmf9c90m   em The DR02 humanoid robot from DEEP Robotics showcases remarkable versatility and agility. From the graceful flow of Tai Chi to the energetic moves of street dance, DR02 combines precision, strength, and artistry with ease!  em   blockquote  p class  shortcode-media shortcode-media-youtube   span class  rm-shortcode  data-rm-shortcode-id  af1aeba4dff0ce55cf585b5e4b73f719  style  display block position relative padding-top 56.25     iframe frameborder  0  height  auto  lazy-loadable  true  scrolling  no  src    style  position absolute top 0 left 0 width 100  height 100    width  100     iframe   span   p  p    a href    Robotics  a     p  div class  horizontal-rule    div  blockquote class  rm-anchors  id  rdk9ob_ftvg   em Decreasing the Cost of Morphing in Adaptive Morphogenetic Robots  By using kirigami laminar jamming flippers, the Jamming Amphibious Robotic Turtle  JART  can quickly morph its limbs to adapt to changing terrain. This pneumatic layer jamming technology enables multi-environment locomotion on land and water by changing the robot s flipper shape and stiffness to decrease the cost of transport.  em   blockquote  p class  shortcode-media shortcode-media-youtube   span class  rm-shortcode  data-rm-shortcode-id  573771858e8a693a8c456c88f34f2b0f  style  display block position relative padding-top 56.25     iframe frameborder  0  height  auto  lazy-loadable  true  scrolling  no  src    style  position absolute top 0 left 0 width 100  height 100    width  100     iframe   span   p  p    a href       p  div class  horizontal-rule    div  blockquote class  rm-anchors  id  9qbozsuubdi   em Super Odometry is a resilient sensor-fusion framework that delivers accurate, real-time state estimation in challenging environments by integrating external and inertial sensing. For decades, SLAM has depended on external sensors like cameras and lidar. We argue it s time to reverse this hierarchy  True robustness begins from within. By placing inertial sensing at the core of state estimation, robots gain an inner sense of motion. We believe the systems that not only see, but also feel, learn, and adapt.  em   blockquote  p class  shortcode-media shortcode-media-youtube   span class  rm-shortcode  data-rm-shortcode-id  2045f6a9cefbab74925f4c0ec69480f6  style  display block position relative padding-top 56.25     iframe frameborder  0  height  auto  lazy-loadable  true  scrolling  no  src    style  position absolute top 0 left 0 width 100  height 100    width  100     iframe   span   p  p    a href       p  div class  horizontal-rule    div
